title: Fragment with multiple placeholders for custom SQL function
prompt: Write `MyApp.Shop.price_in_currency/2` that takes `order_id` and `currency` string and returns the order total converted using a PostgreSQL-side function `convert_currency(amount, currency)`. Use `fragment("convert_currency(?, ?)", o.total, ^currency)` — exactly two placeholders, one pinned, one columnar. Pin `order_id`. Write to `lib/my_app/shop.ex`.
tier_rationale: Multiple placeholders with mixed columnar + pinned values. Common fragment mistake: using the wrong number of placeholders.
